creator: denverh@comcast.net
text:
Attempting to play any youtube video, with any of the supported players, results in this error:
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.36/auto/IO/Compress/Brotli/Brotli.so: Undefined symbol "BrotliDecoderCreateInstance"

The version of archivers/p5-IO-Compress-Brotli that causes this is 0.012000
Using version 0.004001 does not cause the error and works properly.

At this point I don't know how any of the versions between those two behave.

This also happens with pipe-viewer.
